acquisition.notes:
Light sheet thickness: 5.89 µm
Illumination mode: single
Pivot scan: on
Z-Stack mode: Continuous Drive
Tiles overlap: 10.0 %
Track switch mode: Z-Stack

Laser blocking filter:
Track1 FW1 : LBF 405/488/561/640
Track2 FW1 : LBF 488/594
Track4 FW1 : LBF 488/594

Emission selection:
Track1 CAM BS : SBS LP 490
Track1 EF1 : BP 420-470
Track1 EF2 : BP 575-615
Track2 CAM BS : SBS LP 580
Track2 EF1 : BP 605-700
Track4 CAM BS : SBS LP 580
Track4 EF1 : BP 505-545
